possible_causes: NTC plug not plugged in or has come loose
multiple plug on the PCB not plugged in correctly

source_refs.section_title: 13.2.8 Overview of fault codes
source_refs.source_quote: F.00 Flow temperature sensor interruption NTC plug not plugged in or has come loose, multiple plug on the PCB not plugged in correctly, interruption in cable harness, NTC defective

possible_causes: NTC plug not plugged in or has come loose
multiple plug on the PCB not plugged in correctly

fault_codes.description: Interruption cylinder charging sensor actoSTOR (NTC) only in combination with F.91
possible_causes: defective plug connection on actoSTOR electronics

fault_codes.description: Interruption cylinder sensor actoSTOR (NTC) only in combination with F.91
possible_causes: defective plug connection on actoSTOR electronics

fault_codes.description: Short circuit at cylinder charging sensor (NTC) only in combination with F.91
VU-/VUW boiler: Short circuit warm start sensor/cylinder sensor; VUW boiler with actoSTOR: Short circuit cylinder sensor (NTC) only in combination with F.91

possible_causes: Incorrect earth connection between cable harness and boiler
flow or return NTC defective (loose connection)
No or too low water pressure in the boiler
cable to pump or water pressure sensor loose/not connected/defective

fault_codes.description: Safety switch-off: Temperature difference too great
Safety switch-off: Temperature rise too fast
Safety switch-off: Flue gas temperature too high
possible_causes: Break in plug connection for optional flue gas safety thermostat (STB)
Gas valve stepper motor not connected
multiple plug on the PCB not plugged in correctly
Gas meter defective or gas pressure regulator has triggered
multiple plug on PCB incorrectly plugged in
ignition system (ignition transformer, ignition cable, ignition plug, ignition electrode) defective
Plug at fan not correctly plugged in
multiple plug on PCB not correctly plugged in

fault_codes.description: Coding resistor fault (possible in combination with F.70)
possible_causes: Short circuit/interruption in coding resistor output range (in cable harness at heat exchanger) or gas group resistor (on PCB)
eBUS overload or two power supplies with different polarities on the eBUS
plug not connected or incorrectly connected
filter below venturi filter cap wet or blocked

fault_codes.description: Gas pressure fault (in combination with F.28/F.29)
possible_causes: No or too little gas supply pressure
cable harness to gas valve defective
Short circuit/short to earth in cable harness for the gas valve
Gas valve defective (coils shorted to earth)
Supply or return NTC short circuited
Electronics overheating due to external influences
Spare part case: Display and PCB replaced at same time and DSN not set
wrong or missing output range coding resistor
Flow temperature sensor signalling constant value:
Flow temperature sensor incorrectly positioned at supply pipe.
Flow/return temperature difference too great -> flow and/or return temperature sensor defective

fault_codes.description: Water pressure sensor signal in the wrong range (too low)
possible_causes: Interruption/short circuit of water pressure sensor
interruption/short circuit to GND in supply line to water pressure sensor or water pressure sensor defective

fault_codes.description: Water pressure sensor signal outside correct range (too high)
possible_causes: Cable to water pressure sensor has short-circuited at 5 V/24 V
internal fault in water pressure sensor

fault_codes.description: Fault, no pressure change detection when starting pump
possible_causes: Water pressure sensor and/or pump defective
too low water pressure in boiler
connect external expansion vessel to return

fault_codes.description: Overheating protection on primary heat exchanger has responded
possible_causes: Cable or cable connections for safety fuse in primary heat exchanger or primary heat exchanger defective
No response from flue non-return flap or condensate pump defective

fault_codes.description: Interruption to DHW outlet sensor at external controller
possible_causes: UK link box is connected, but hot water NTC not bridged

fault_codes.description: Flow and/or return temperature sensor temperature change fault
possible_causes: When the burner starts, the temperature change registered at flow and/or return temperature sensor is non-existent or too small.
Not enough water in the boiler
Flow and/return temperature sensor not in correct position at pipe.

fault_codes.description: Fault: Flow/return temperature sensor temperature difference implausible
possible_causes: Flow and return temperature sensors returning implausible values.
Flow and return temperature sensors have been inverted.
Flow and return temperature sensors have not been correctly fitted.

fault_codes.description: Fault: Flow and return temperature sensors incorrectly fitted
possible_causes: Flow and/or return temperature sensors have been fitted to the same pipe/wrong pipe.
The coding resistor on the PCB does not match the entered gas family
repeat the gas family check and enter the correct gas family.
manufacturer_steps: repeat the gas family check and enter the correct gas family.

possible_causes: Combustion quality outside the permitted range
internal pressure measuring point in venturi blocked (do not use lubricant on O-ring in venturi.)
Communication fault between display and PCB in the electronics box
